legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires OS file picker, runtime label creation/drag, Preview/Reader, persistence, or accessibility flows.

mappings.reason: Upload images of varying dimensions without distortion/cropping — OS file picker + server-side image handling. Component+image-area placement is asserted in 'TC_01/TC_12 — Component is placed successfully with its image area'.
Validate supported (.jpg/.svg/.png) vs unsupported extensions — OS file picker + server-side validation

Add up to 20 labels and restrict the 21st — runtime image-area clicks (scope.addLabel, maxCounter=20). Label-container presence + source max are asserted in 'TC_03 — Label container exists and respects the 20-label source maximum'.

mappings.it: TC_04 — Text & Number label-type radios are present; Numbers is the default
mappings.note: type radios + default automated; per-type pin rendering needs runtime label creation (deferred)

mappings.reason: Settings panel stays fixed/visible during component scroll — visual/layout assertion

mappings.it: TC_06 — "Show Instruction" toggle shows/hides the instruction on the component
TC_07 — "Show Arrow" toggle is present (text or number variant)
mappings.note: control presence automated; arrow appearing on a pin is a runtime visual (deferred)

mappings.it: TC_08 — "Show Header" toggle shows/hides the header on the component
TC_09 — Style panel is present with selectable styles
mappings.note: panel presence automated; the immediate 'applied' visual is a render check (deferred)

mappings.it: TC_10 — Tags manager is present and accepts multiple tags
TC_11 — Header / Instruction / Question / Caption accept special characters

mappings.reason: Replace image with smaller/larger one renders without layout issues — OS file picker + visual. Component+image-area placement is asserted in 'TC_01/TC_12 — Component is placed successfully with its image area'.
